title: wasm NieClient.connect/on_event gap drops notifications between auth and callback install
description: After NieClient.connect() resolves, any relay notifications arriving before on_event() is called are silently dropped (no-op callback is active). The API shape inherently creates this race window. Neither connect() nor on_event() document this. A JS developer who sets up the handler after await client.connect() in the natural way will miss early events. Fix: add a JSDoc warning to connect() that on_event() should be called immediately after the promise resolves.
